Description: User authentication and project foundation setup.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Sanctum enabled
- Registration & login endpoints
- Basic UI to log in

Description: As a customer, I can register and log in to access my dashboard.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /auth/register creates user
- POST /auth/login returns token
- UI login form works
- Tests for happy path

Description: Site creation and appliance catalog management.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Create site API/UI
- Appliance catalog seeded
- Add user appliances to site

Description: As a customer, I can create one site with name/address/coords.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /sites creates site
- UI form validates inputs
- Site visible in list

Description: As an admin, I seed and list appliances for users to select.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Seed script for appliances
- GET /appliances returns catalog

Description: As a customer, I can add appliances to my site for estimation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Persist user_appliances
- Validation and simple UI

Description: Energy estimation and basic hardware recommendation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Estimation service computes totals
- Recommendation suggests panel/inverter/battery

Description: As a customer, I can compute totals (kW, kWh, monthly cost) for my site.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /estimations returns totals
- Persist estimation record
- Unit tests for calc

Description: As a customer, I can view recommended hardware.
Acceptance Criteria:
- GET /estimations/{id}/recommendations returns items
- Ties to provider hardware

Description: Minimal dev experience to support MVP.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Seed data and demo script
- Basic CI checks

Description: As a developer, I have seed data and a simple demo script.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Seeder for users/appliances/hardware
- Demo path works end-to-end

Description: Project creation and manual installer assignment.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Create project from estimation
- Admin assigns installer

Description: As a customer, I can create a project from a successful estimation.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /projects creates a project linked to customer/site
- Project status initialized

Description: As an admin, I can assign an installer to a project.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin UI to select installer
- Project updated with installer_id

- Payment endpoint and gateway integration
- Status update & persistence

Description: As a customer, I can pay upfront for my project.
Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /projects/{id}/payments records payment
- Gateway mock/live response handled
- Status updated

- Manage hardware types/categories
- Basic user management

Description: As an admin, I can manage hardware types and categories.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CRUD endpoints and minimal UI
- Validation in place

Description: As an admin, I can activate/suspend users.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Update user status
- Simple UI control
